summary: Comprehensive testing of V3 Multi-Timeframe Signal Engine. 42 tests passed, 1 expected failure (xfail) for known target calculation bug. All V3 endpoints working correctly: /api/v3/trade-signal, /api/v3/active-setups, /api/v3/expire-setup, /api/v3/clear-setups. Phase transitions work correctly (SETUP_DETECTED -> WAITING_FOR_RETEST -> ENTRY_READY). Structure-based stop loss calculation verified. Found bug in target calculation for SHORT direction.

minor.issue: SHORT target calculation bug: target_1 may be above entry price. Line 5702-5704 takes supports[0].price without checking if it's below entry_price. Current data showed target_1=$74,543 above entry=$74,022 for SHORT position.
minor.fix_suggestion: Filter supports to only include those with price < entry_price before selecting target_1 for SHORT direction

passed_tests: V3 response has setup counts (setups_detected_count, setups_waiting_count, setups_ready_count)
V3 response has 5M candle data info
V3 response has market_regime_details with scores
V3 defaults to Italian for invalid language
V3 active-setups count matches list length
V3 setup has all required fields
V3 stop_loss is structure-based (below swing_low for LONG)
V3 setups have targets with types
V3 signal and active-setups data is consistent
action_items: Fix calculate_v3_targets() to filter supports by price < entry_price for SHORT direction (line 5702-5704 in server.py)
critical_code_review_comments: detect_4h_events() correctly uses swing high/low as PRIMARY structural reference with liquidity as SECONDARY reinforcement
detect_5m_confirmation() implements all 3 confirmation patterns: rejection_candle, stabilization, micro_structure_break
calculate_v3_stop_loss() correctly calculates structure-based stops with adaptive buffer (0.1-0.25%)
BUG: calculate_v3_targets() doesn't filter supports/resistances to ensure targets are in the correct direction relative to entry
Phase transitions in process_v3_signal() work correctly with proper invalidation logic (>2% from zone)
5M candle caching works correctly (30 second TTL)
context_for_next_testing_agent: V3 Multi-Timeframe Signal Engine tested. Key endpoints: /api/v3/trade-signal?lang={it|en|de|pl}, /api/v3/active-setups, /api/v3/clear-setups. One bug found in calculate_v3_targets() - SHORT targets may be calculated incorrectly (above entry instead of below). The setup phase lifecycle works correctly: SETUP_DETECTED -> WAITING_FOR_RETEST -> ENTRY_READY -> EXECUTED/EXPIRED/INVALIDATED. Test file: test_v3_signal_engine.py covers all V3 features.

rca_of_the_issue.bug: SHORT target_1 calculated above entry price
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: calculate_v3_targets() at line 5702-5704 takes supports[0].price directly without filtering to ensure the support is below the entry price. The supports list may be sorted by distance or strength rather than price direction.
reproduction_steps: 1. Wait for a SHORT setup to be detected
3. Observe target_1 may be above zone_high/entry_price
rca_of_the_issue.mitigation: Filter supports list to only include levels with price < entry_price before selecting target_1 for SHORT direction
